rows.title: Laserfiche Compatibility Information for the Microsoft Windows Security Update for LDAP Channel Binding
rows.detailTitle: Laserfiche Compatibility Information for the Microsoft Windows Security Update for LDAP Channel Binding
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith Laserfiche Compatibility Information for the Microsoft Windows Security Update for LDAP Channel Binding Product: Laserfiche 10.4 KB: 1014157 Published: June 2, 2020 Last Updated: September 8, 2020 Summary The latest versions of the Laserfiche product suite are compatible with the March 10, 2020 Microsoft Windows security update for hardening LDAP channel binding. Additional Information If you are using Laserfiche Forms and you are not using SSL LDAP you will get this error message: "Failed to verify the LDAP configuration. (Object reference not set to an instance of an object.) [LFF360-LDAPFailValidation]." To prevent this, switch over to SSL LDAP. See the Laserfiche Directory Server documentation for a list of potential error messages that may occur when SSL is enabled in LDAP but not in Laserfiche Directory Server. Additional Resources 2020 LDAP channel binding and LDAP signing requirements for Windows ADV190023 | Microsoft Guidance for Enabling LDAP Channel Binding and LDAP Signing Share 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.snippet: Known Issues with WebLink 8.0 17 years ago Theme settings are not retained when you uninstall and reinstall WebLink (47728). WebLink Designer The WebLink Designer does not remember the last state it was in after being clos... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1012220/known-issues-with-weblink- ...
rows.title: Known Issues with WebLink 8.0
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Sign in Known Issues with WebLink 8.0 Product: WebLink 8.0 KB: 1012220 Published: May 26, 2009 Last Updated: May 26, 2009 Summary This article documents the list of known issues with WebLink 8.0. More Information See the following list of known issues for version 8.0. Component Known Issue WebLink Administrator's Utility Virtual Directories can not be created in the WebLink Administration Utility (43340). WebLink Administrator's Utility Configuring one repository to automatically log in with Windows Authentication using the accessing user's account can conflict with another repository configured to automatically log in with Windows Authentication using an anonymous user account. These 2 different configurations require IIS to be set up in different ways (48304). WebLink Designer When WebLink is uninstalled and reinstalled, the settings for the Search Results customized in the WebLink Designer are not retained. Even though the settings will appear to be your specific customizations before uninstalling, you need to resave the settings in order to retain them (47726). WebLink Designer The Theme settings are not retained when you uninstall and reinstall WebLink (47728). WebLink Designer The WebLink Designer does not remember the last state it was in after being closed and reopened (44847). WebLink Users may run into a "lost connection has been detected" or "too many connections" error when accessing a WebLink site installed on a Windows XP machine. Increasing the limit IIS allows will fix this issue. This happens more often when using Internet Explorer 8 (46685). WebLink The Image annotation may not be displayed on the document image (45051). WebLink The Attachment annotations will not display the appropriate icons on the document image (45581). WebLink When WebLink is set up to use folder tunneling, users may see the folder they don't have access to in the breadcrumb. Clicking on the folder in the breadcrumb results in an "Unfortunately, the system is unable to display..." error (48400). WebLink A search cannot be stopped after clicking "Search." You must wait for the current search to finish to refine your search criteria or perform another search (46929). WebLink The Search Pane does not include the updated Laserfiche 8 search types (45513). WebLink You must download the document and print it from its native application. There is no "one-click print" option (46594). WebLink The "My WebLink" settings are configured per repository and stored in a cookie. This means if a user logs in to a different repository or moves to a different client machine, the MyWebLink settings will not follow him/her (47045). Search Forms When adding Sort Options, the options in the left pane are not removed when added to the right pane (46877). Search Forms The Input Type defined under Custom Variable for an Input element may not be available to edit (48511). Mobile Document View Image generation for small image annotations at a low zoom level may fail (47746). 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.snippet: Release Notes for Laserfiche Mobile 10 5 years ago 1013692 https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1013692/release-notes-for-laserfiche-mobile-10 Laserfiche App Summary Laserfiche Mobile is an Android, iOS, and Windows app that l... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1013692/release-notes-for-laser ...
rows.title: Release Notes for Laserfiche Mobile 10
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith Release Notes for Laserfiche Mobile 10 Product: Laserfiche App KB: 1013692 Published: November 17, 2015 Last Updated: October 13, 2020 Summary Laserfiche Mobile is an Android, iOS, and Windows app that lets you capture, upload, and securely access and work with documents and forms in and outside your Laserfiche repository while on the go. Service Pack and Hotfix Information There are no service packs or hotfixes for Laserfiche Mobile 10. System and Software Requirements for Laserfiche Mobile 10 Minimum System Requirements for the Laserfiche Mobile Server If image processing is enabled, it is recommended that the Laserfiche Mobile Server be installed on a machine with a minimum of two cores and should not be installed on the machine that also hosts the Laserfiche Server or database. CPU: Dual-core processor Memory: 2 GB RAM Supported Operating Systems for the Laserfiche Mobile Server Windows 7 Windows 8 Windows 8.1 Windows 10 Windows Server 2008 Windows Server 2008 R2 Windows Server 2012 Windows Server 2012 R2 Android System Requirements Android 2.3 and higher Recommended 512 MB of memory iOS System Requirements iOS 7.1 and later iPhone 4 and later iPad 2, iPad mini, and later Windows Phone Store App Requirements (Desktop and Tablet) Windows 8.1 and 10 Recommended 2 GB memory Laserfiche Components You must have one the following configurations: Laserfiche Rio 8.3 or later Laserfiche Avante 8.3 or later and Laserfiche Forms 9.2 or later Laserfiche Avante 8.3 or later and Web Access 8.3.2 or later Laserfiche Avante 10 or later Optional: Add Laserfiche Forms 9.2 or later to Laserfiche Rio 8.3 or later to interact with forms. Add Laserfiche Forms 9.2.1 or later to Laserfiche Rio 9.2.1 or later to interact with drafts in Forms. Add Laserfiche Forms 10 or later to Laserfiche Rio 10 or later to interact with teams in Forms. Notes: If you do not have Laserfiche Forms, you will still be able to use the app, but you will not be able to perform forms actions. You can also use the app to only review and submit forms. You are not required to connect to a repository. Laserfiche 10 and later is required for full functionality. Version 10 of the Laserfiche Server, Laserfiche Directory Server, and Laserfiche Forms is required to use Laserfiche Directory Server's single sign-on functionality. Known Issues Laserfiche Mobile Server The drop-down menus on the Configuration page may be out of focus in some browsers. (134182) The error reported when a Forms server is configured incorrectly may not state the correct solution. (137367) A port defined in the Laserfiche Server name on the Configuration page is not detected if SSL is configured. (135926) Only one organization can be configured on the Mobile Configuration page. (136733) Laserfiche images saved as offline copies of documents may appear distorted (Electronic documents are clearly displayed). (137514) Laserfiche images opened from the search results may appear distorted (Electronic documents are clearly displayed). (137555) The ability to switch Forms servers in the Laserfiche Mobile app is only available when signed in to Laserfiche Forms (135655). When a user does not have appropriate rights to sign in to a repository, and an administrator modifies the rights, the user must sign in to a different repository before he/she can sign in to the current repository. (119759) Configuring a domain on the Laserfiche Mobile Configuration Page results in repository users unable to sign in (137879). Android App You can not navigate back to the Start page using the device's "back" button from the Offline Copies tab under Local Documents. (137341) When capturing new images, tapping on the thumbnail of the last captured image navigates to the first captured image. (137082) The Last Modified date/time of local documents does not follow the device's date/time settings. (133456) Two dialog boxes will appear when tapping on a List field. (136021) Phone: Clicking on a URL inside an email for a specific document takes you to the root of the repository instead of the specific document. (126223) The italic font style is not supported on the Samsung Galaxy Note II phone. It may also not be supported on other older Android devices. (137521) An image uploaded as a forms attachment retains its original orientation, even if it has been rotated before uploading. (136030) Signatures applied to PDFs contain a blue background. (138149) iOS App Sharing text with Facebook may fail and display a "There was a problem sharing your link" error. (137254) The Search box may appear when rotating the device while inside a sub folder. (125162) The iPad app may crash when attempting to open a large image file. (130570) The app crashes if you try to open a document from another application in the app after it has been force closed. (137211) Editable text boxes on imported PDFs do not show up in the Document Viewer. (136492) Tapping anywhere outside the keyboard while filling out a f

rows.snippet: List of Changes for Laserfiche Forms 10.4.3 6 years ago 10.4.3 February 21, 2020 | KB: 1014114 https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1014114/list-of-changes-for-laserfiche-forms-10-4-3 Laserfiche Forms Summary This article details each ...... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1014114/list-of-changes-for-las ...
rows.title: List of Changes for Laserfiche Forms 10.4.3
rows.detailTitle: List of Changes for Laserfiche Forms 10.4.3
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith List of Changes for Laserfiche Forms 10.4.3 Product: Laserfiche Forms KB: 1014114 Published: February 21, 2020 Last Updated: February 21, 2020 Summary This article details each change for Laserfiche Forms 10.4.3. Updates Added auditing for instance cancellation. When an instance is stopped, details are logged. Added the ability to send an email notification when a process is suspended. Updated the HTML generated for forms to meet WCAG requirements for aria tags. Chromium 79.0.3942.0 installation is now a prerequisite during Forms setup to support PDF generation. Forms 10.4.3 uses Puppeteer Sharp with Chromium 79.0.3942.0 for pdf generation instead of Wkhtmltopdf/WkhtmltopdfArguments, which have been deprecated. While newer version of Chromium will not be altered during installation, using any version of Chromium other than 79.0.3942.0 is untested. Updated the following libraries for security enhancements: jQuery library updated to 3.4.1 jQuery UI library updated to 1.12.1 AngularJS updated to 1.7.9 Moment.js updated to 2.24.0 Lodash updated to 4.17.15 mathjs updated to 6.2.5 If you have customized forms with javascript, check your custom scripts for the following: If referencing JQuery 1.x, the reference needs to be removed. If custom js referenced other libraries, verify that the libraries are compatible with JQuery 3.x. The iframe onload event may occur before (document).ready(). Place the iframe onload outside of (document).ready(). (Example: https://answers.laserfiche.com/questions/164779/Fill-Forms-field-from-iframe#165379) Prior to Forms 10.4.3, .width(), .height(), .css("width"), and .css("height") methods returned rounded integer values, and will now return decimal values when used in custom javascript. Value-returning jQuery methods will return "undefined" when used with an empty JQuery collection, where "null" was previously returned. Fixes Previous versions misused the "for" CSS attribute in form html generation, this has been corrected to use the "aria-labelledby" and "aria-describedby" attributes for WCAG compliance. (208516) Fixed an "Object reference not set ..." error at form submit when many concurrent users are using Forms. (201929) (G sync suite for Outlook) Fixed an issue where direct approval via email sent the approve/reject action but did not send comments. (212264) Fixed an error affecting back-end validation for read-only fields with certain time values. (211852) Fixed the verification of untrusted ssl certificates being bypassed. (206516) Fixed an error that occurred when fields with rules attached are deleted from the form and then viewed. (221241) Fixed an issue when a process with a field formula containing "\" is copied, the calculation fails. (187046) Fixed an issue where a date passed via URL parameter was ignored if a default date was set to the current date. (207763) Fixed an issue where a form using CSS grid layout did not keep the grid on saving to PDF. (184881) Downloaded forms now respect custom inline CSS. (83597) An empty required field can no longer be submitted if a draft is saved with an invalid value then the invalid value is cleared on the user task. (186759) Fixed an issue involving moving a field into a collection causing issues with existing processes, where the value may be lost in subsequent forms in the the process. (185532) Fixed an error that occurred when trying to directly approve an unassigned task after opening it. (202449) Increased the length allowed for user task comments to 2000 characters. (192056) Fixed an issue when 10,000+ timers were set for execution, causing excess memory usage. (217222) Added support for using the row() function in the Path attribute of a Save To Repository task. (184212) Fixed an issue where a repository session cache was not cleared in the event of a logout failure when saving saving to repository. (207490) Updated the minimum OS version for installation due to Microsoft ending support for Windows 7 and Windows Server 2008r2. (221065) Forms now displays the instance name in the task header on an opened user task. (213215) Improved load time for tasks with a form that contains lots of fields and many file upload fields. (212435) Action history now saves Arabic characters correctly in comments. (185563) Fixed an issue with multiple imported processes failing to create the teams list. (207128) Fixed an issue where the element IDs were in conflict, causing an element in the flow diagram to be lost. (199419) Enabled ability to print forms in color from within the browser. (209593) Fixed an issue with single-sign-out and Chrome version 80, where users were not signed out properly when the Forms server and LFDSSTS server are in different domains using HTTPS. This issue will still occur using HTTP. (223884) Fixed an issue caused by an ASP.Net update where a form embedded in an iframe failed to allow authentication to the form when the Forms server and page host are in different domains using HTT

rows.detailTitle: List of Changes for the Laserfiche Audit Trail 10.4.0 Hotfix 1014032.
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith List of Changes for the Laserfiche Audit Trail 10.4.0 Hotfix 1014032. Product: Audit Trail 10.4 KB: 1014032 Published: February 21, 2019 Last Updated: February 21, 2019 Summary This article lists the changes for Laserfiche Audit Trail 10.4.0 Hotfix 1014032 The update includes the following fix: You no longer receive receive an "ERROR [08001] [Microsoft][ODBC SQL Server Driver][DBNETLIB]SSL Security error ERROR [01000] [Microsoft][ODBC SQL Server Driver][DBNETLIB]ConnectionOpen (SECCreateCredentials())." Error message when viewing the Audit Trail configuration site when TLS 1.0 is turned off. (149401) Resolution To update Laserfiche Audit Trail 10.4 Click the following link to download KB1014032.zip Extract the contents of the zip file to a temporary location on the computer hosting Audit Trail. Double-click AuditTrail_10.4.0.109_KB1014032.exe to update Audit Trail 10.4. Share 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.title: Known Issues With Laserfiche 8.0.0
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith Known Issues With Laserfiche 8.0.0 Product: Laserfiche 8, Audit Trail 8.0.0, Scanning 8.0.0, Snapshot 8.0.0 KB: 1011953 Published: March 31, 2008 Last Updated: March 31, 2008 Summary This article documents the list of known issues with Laserfiche 8.0.0. More Information See the following list of known issues for version 8.0.0. Product Known Issue Laserfiche Administration Console Unregistering and reregistering a repository resets the location of the audit logs. (34062) Audit Trail The "Configure Laserfiche Audit Trail 8" and "Laserfiche Audit Trail 8 Main Page" links in the Start menu do not have the correct icons. (36038) Audit Trail Large legends can potentially obscure chart data. (34888) Client 1011204 White Redactions Are Marked with a Black Border Prior to Saving Changes to the Document. (37889) Client 1011989 You May Be Unable to Modify Your Laserfiche Installation From Programs and Features on Windows Vista or Windows Server 2008. (37344) Client 1011995 Laserfiche Does Not Save Field Search Settings. (37994) Client You may not be able to open Laserfiche document shortcut files (.lfe) on Windows Vista when you first install Laserfiche. You can resolve this issue by loading the client once using the "Run as Administrator" option. (37506) Client An "Error determining word locations." error occurs when viewing OCR'ed Asian language documents that contain linked annotations. The OCR engine does not generate word location information for multi-byte Asian languages. (36543) Client You may need to restart you computer after installing the Laserfiche Client. (36106) Client Opacity levels for image annotations may not display correctly in exported PDF's. (35697) Client Pressing the SPACEBAR will not automatically populate the date fields in the Modification Date search interface. (35557) Client The "Recent Documents" listing in the File menu can truncate path information using a ellipsis. This means that documents with the same name that are located in different parts of your repository may appear as duplicate items in the "Recent Documents" listing. (35149) Client There may be certain annotation display issues when using the Laserfiche Client through Remote Desktop. For example, a sticky note may display as black even though you chose a different color. However, after saving changes, the sticky note appears as the desired color. Another example is that attachment annotation icons may not display properly.(33325, 34844) Client You cannot remove the assigned template when you multi-select multiple documents.(26049) Client The Record Folder properties dialog remains in writable mode even after you perform certain record management actions the prevent the changes from taking place. For example, you can change the assigned cutoff instruction on a record folder that has already been cut off. However, since the record folder is already in disposition, the change has no effect on the record folder. (33599) Client Temporary files created during the text extraction process may not be properly deleted when you attempt to extract text from an unsupported file type. (31727) Client Pressing the SPACEBAR will not automatically populate a date/time field if the field already contains a value. (28005) Migration Field names are migrated over in all lowercase letters. (33295) Scanning When reloading Laserfiche Scanning after a crash, you can choose to recover documents that have not been sent to Laserfiche. Template data may not properly display for the recovered documents. However, this is only a display issue and the data is not lost. When you send the documents to your repository, the template data will be properly saved. (37730) Scanning Scanning will not automatically create a subfolder if a document with the same name as the folder Scanning is trying to create already exists in the parent folder. When you try to send your documents, the Output Log will display a "The parameter is incorrect" error message. You can manually create the desired subfolder and resend the documents. (37698) Scanning Field data in a single field may not be properly saved if you do not change cursor focus to another element before clicking the option to send to Laserfiche. For example, if you scan a document, choose a template, specify field data in two fields, and send while the cursor is still in the second field, the value you specified in the second field will not be saved in Laserfiche. (37411) Scanning Laserfiche Scanning and the OCR engine are both components of the Laserfiche Client installation. During the Laserfiche Client installation, if you choose to install Laserfiche Scanning, but do not choose to install the OCR engine, the OCR process in Laserfiche Scanning will be available. However, if you configure your scanning process with an OCR process, it will silently fail. (35524) Scanning The Paper size drop-down list may not function properly when using WIA scanner drivers. (35371) Server 1011994 An

rows.title: Release Notes for Laserfiche Cloud
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith Release Notes for Laserfiche Cloud Product: Laserfiche KB: 1013980 Published: October 12, 2018 Last Updated: October 16, 2019 Summary This article documents new features in the current Laserfiche Cloud 2019.4 release. This update includes enhancements to the Salesforce Integration, the Laserfiche Home page, the introduction of Laserfiche Forms functions through business processes, and more. New Features Co-authoring with Microsoft Office 365 Co-author Microsoft Word, Excel, or PowerPoint documents with multiple people using your Office 365 Business account. Changes can be made directly in your web browser, and will be automatically integrated and saved in the repository. Laserfiche Vault This release introduces Laserfiche Vault, an add-on to Cloud that enables strict compliance mode for records management. OCR Language Support Laserfiche Cloud automatically performs OCR on all documents scanned or imported into the repository. You can now set an OCR language for documents on a repository-wide basis or configure it directly on an individual document at the time of import. The OCR language set at the document level will take precedence over repository-wide settings, allowing you to easily support a repository with documents in multiple languages. Process Automation Note: For an optimized experience, we recommend using Google Chrome or Mozilla Firefox. Public Facing Forms in Process Automation Collect information from public users with web forms to kick off internal processes in Process Automation. Public forms can be shared with users whether they are registered or not, allowing organizations to collect and act on responses from anyone. With public portal, you can turn this option on when viewing the process details for a business process. Integrations Microsoft Dynamics has been added to the list of built-in CRM platform integrations, and provides access to standard objects in the Dynamics 365 Sales Hub through the Workflow "Perform CRM Action" activity. Data query rules now include options to Insert and Update data in data sources. Define Web Service Connections and Web Request Rules, for use with the Run Web Request Rule activity, to build integrations with external systems. Known Issues The following list identifies general issues. In a decision table, if an input type is changed from Boolean to a non-Boolean type to Boolean, the values available in the predefined list will be within double quotes, resulting in a field error if they are selected. In addition, if the user attempts to enter True or False (without double quotes) as a value, a field error will still display. (146404) If a customer does not have a repository and one of their users configures a Workflow activity that contains a Connection Profile drop-down menu, any fields that would normally appear under the drop-down menu will be missing. If you use an Insert Email token from an Update Word Document activity to insert text into an email body using the Email activity, and include any characters in the email body other than the token, the token's value will be a file path to a .txt file rather than the output of the Update Word Document activity. Deleting everything in the email body (including the token) and pasting the token back into the email body resolves this. (114266) If you select Set Retention Schedule as the action in a Set Records Management Properites activity, change the selection action two more times, then undo the latter two changes but pressing CTRL+Z twice, Set Retention Schedule will be displayed as the selected action, but no retention schedules will actually be retrieved. (115955) If you select an activity in the Workflow designer, then click on the Starting Events button in the left pane, then return to the designer by clicking on the Designer button in the left pane, the activity that you had last selected still appears to be selected, but the properties pane displayed is of the parent activity, not the activity you last selected. (117567) When you open different workflows in multiple tabs within the Workflow designer and run each workflow within its own tab, the information shown in the Instances view does not change when you switch between tabs. In addition, you will not be able to close tabs. (144902) The SPLIT function in the token calculator does not work unless the string to be split is enclosed in double quotes. (145011) The Laserfiche Windows client's Folder Properties dialog box will not display Folder Contents information when connected to a Laserfiche Cloud repository. You cannot currently import workflow processes from Workflow 10 onto Workflows in process automation. The Read Barcode activity includes checksum characters in the output. (110517) You cannot select field values for a list field in the condition editor of a Condition Starting Event when the field includes a blank value. (105808) Activities within branches of other activities lose their connection profiles when co

rows.snippet: Known Issues with WebLink 6.17. 21 years ago 1000959 https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1000959/known-issues-with-weblink-6-17- WebLink 6.17 Summary This article documents known issues with Laserfiche WebLink 6.17. More Infor... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1000959/known-issues-with-weblink- ...
rows.title: Known Issues with WebLink 6.17.
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith Known Issues with WebLink 6.17. Product: WebLink 6.17 KB: 1000959 Published: May 6, 2005 Last Updated: May 6, 2005 Summary This article documents known issues with Laserfiche WebLink 6.17. More Information See the following list of known issues for version 6.17. WebLink Known Issues Field values that contain consecutive blank spaces will not display correctly. Such field values will display with only one blank space. (20623) Attempting to view an empty document can cause an error. (19399) WebLink does not enforce the Search feature right. Users without the Search feature right will still be able to perform searches in WebLink. (10257) Attempting to view a document stored on a removable volume that has not been mounted will not cause WebLink to report the name of the volume that needs to be mounted. (12662) A name search cannot be performed without wildcards for an item whose name contains a quotation mark. If you would like to search for such an item, then you should use a ? or an * in place of each quotation mark. For example, to search for a document called John "Bullet" Smith, you would search for the following: John ?Bullet? Smith. (11837) The Zoom feature does not behave correctly when the time on the web server is significantly ahead of the time set on the client machine. (10673) Under certain circumstances, logging back into WebLink after your session has expired will not properly display the image or text that you had been previously viewing. (7396) Closing the Fields, Sticky Notes, or Thumbnails pane while viewing a PDF version of a document will display the original image in place of the PDF. (7327) When using Boolean operators to specify search criteria, you should only use "AND", "OR", "NOT", and "WITHIN" when performing simple full-text searches. If you plan on using the advanced search syntax, you should not use "AND", "OR", "NOT", or "WITHIN". Instead, you should use their symbol equivalent: &, |, -, and ^, respectively.(6043) This version of Laserfiche WebLink does not support Laserfiche COLDLink. If you would like to use Laserfiche COLDLink, then you should use Laserfiche WebLink version 6.1. If your HTTP (web) Server currently supports multiple port assignments, you must include the correct port assignment in the WebLink URL. For example, http://YourServerName:81 /WebLink/ When using a version of the Laserfiche Server prior to 5.02, WebLink will display a list field as an edit box instead of a combo box. To resolve this issue, the Laserfiche Server must be upgraded to version 5.03 or higher. A generic Windows icon is used to identify electronic documents in the Search Results window. (2907) Certain error messages are displayed in Hex format. When using Microsoft Internet Explorer 5.5 to view a document as a PDF, the Acrobat viewer may be launched, but the document will not be displayed. Disabling Adobe Acrobat Reader's integration with the Internet Explorer browser will fix this problem. To disable Adobe Acrobat Reader's web integration follow these steps: Exit from Internet Explorer. Start the Acrobat 4.0x viewer. From the File menu, point to Preferences, and then select General. Deselect Web Browser Integration in the Options section and then click OK. Exit from the Acrobat 4.0x viewer. Restart Internet Explorer. Enabling the HTTP 1.1 option on Internet Explorer 4.x may significantly delay the display of WebLink GIF files. This is due to a bug in IE 4.x. Solutions are: a) turn off HTTP 1.1 in IE 4.x; b) downgrade to IE 3; or c) upgrade to IE 5. Related Links Please refer to the following article to learn more about Laserfiche WebLink 6.17. 1000958 List of Fixes in WebLink 6.17 Share 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.title: Known Issues with WebLink 6.16.
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith Known Issues with WebLink 6.16. Product: WebLink 6.16 KB: 1000816 Published: December 6, 2004 Last Updated: December 6, 2004 Summary This article documents known issues with Laserfiche WebLink 6.16. More Information WebLink Known Issues WebLink does not enforce the Search feature right. Users without the Search feature right will still be able to perform searches in WebLink. (10257) Attempting to view a document stored on a removable volume that has not been mounted will not cause WebLink to report the name of the volume that needs to be mounted. (12662) A name search cannot be performed without wildcards for an item whose name contains a quotation mark. If you would like to search for such an item, then you should use a ? or an * in place of each quotation mark. For example, to search for a document called John "Bullet" Smith, you would search for the following: John ?Bullet? Smith. (11837) The Zoom feature does not behave correctly when the time on the web server is significantly ahead of the time set on the client machine. (10673) Under certain circumstances, logging back into WebLink after your session has expired will not properly display the image or text that you had been previously viewing. (7396) Closing the Fields, Sticky Notes, or Thumbnails pane while viewing a PDF version of a document will display the original image in place of the PDF. (7327) When using Boolean operators to specify search criteria, you should only use "AND", "OR", "NOT", and "WITHIN" when performing simple full-text searches. If you plan on using the advanced search syntax, you should not use "AND", "OR", "NOT", or "WITHIN". Instead, you should use their symbol equivalent: &, |, -, and ^, respectively.(6043) This version of Laserfiche WebLink does not support Laserfiche COLDLink. If you would like to use Laserfiche COLDLink, then you should use Laserfiche WebLink version 6.1. If your HTTP (web) Server currently supports multiple port assignments, you must include the correct port assignment in the WebLink URL. For example, http://YourServerName:81 /WebLink/ When using a version of the Laserfiche Server prior to 5.02, WebLink will display a list field as an edit box instead of a combo box. To resolve this issue, the Laserfiche Server must be upgraded to version 5.03 or higher. The advanced search syntax allows a user to perform searches that are currently not supported. A folder search will not allow you to view the contents of the folder. Performing a search that looks for field values or a phrase may not allow you to view certain results or it may produce incorrect results. A generic Windows icon is used to identify electronic documents in the Search Results window. (2907) Certain error messages are displayed in Hex format. When using Microsoft Internet Explorer 5.5 to view a document as a PDF, the Acrobat viewer may be launched, but the document will not be displayed. Disabling Adobe Acrobat Reader's integration with the Internet Explorer browser will fix this problem. To disable Adobe Acrobat Reader's web integration follow these steps: Exit from Internet Explorer. Start the Acrobat 4.0x viewer. From the File menu, point to Preferences, and then select General. Deselect Web Browser Integration in the Options section and then click OK. Exit from the Acrobat 4.0x viewer. Restart Internet Explorer. By default, Laserfiche WebLink is configured to limit PDF downloads to 75 pages. This limit can be changed from Settings.inc by modifying the value to which PDF_LIMIT is set. When configuring the PDF download limit, you should keep in mind that WebLink has a total PDF download limit of 275 pages. If a document contains more than 275 pages and you wish to download the document in PDF format, then you must download the PDF version of the document in portions until you have the complete document. Each portion should contain less pages than the PDF limit or 275 pages (whichever is smaller). (2997) Note: The constant PDF_LIMIT (configured in Settings.inc) should not exceed 275. Setting PDF_LIMIT past this limit may cause the Laserfiche Server to become unstable. Enabling the HTTP 1.1 option on Internet Explorer 4.x may significantly delay the display of WebLink GIF files. This is due to a bug in IE 4.x. Solutions are: a) turn off HTTP 1.1 in IE 4.x; b) downgrade to IE 3; or c) upgrade to IE 5. Share 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark
